import pandas as pd


def filter_orders(df, min_amount, category):
    mask = (df["amount"] > min_amount) & (df["category"] == category)
    return df[mask]


def compute_metrics(df, col_name):
    df["computed"] = df[col_name] * 2 + 1
    return df


def dynamic_filter(df, filters):
    mask = pd.Series(True, index=df.index)
    for key, value in filters.items():
        mask = mask & (df[key] == value)
    return df[mask]
